시편 84:1.content: How lovely are your dwellings, Yahweh of Armies!

시편 84:2.content: My soul longs, and even faints for the courts of Yahweh. My heart and my flesh cry out for the living God.

시편 84:3.content: Yes, the sparrow has found a home, and the swallow a nest for herself, where she may have her young, near your altars, Yahweh of Armies, my King, and my God.

시편 84:4.content: Blessed are those who dwell in your house. They are always praising you.

시편 84:5.content: Blessed are those whose strength is in you, who have set their hearts on a pilgrimage.

시편 84:6.content: Passing through the valley of Weeping, they make it a place of springs. Yes, the autumn rain covers it with blessings.

시편 84:7.content: They go from strength to strength. Every one of them appears before God in Zion.

시편 84:8.content: Yahweh, God of Armies, hear my prayer. Listen, God of Jacob.

시편 84:9.content: Behold, God our shield, look at the face of your anointed.

시편 84:10.content: For a day in your courts is better than a thousand. I would rather be a doorkeeper in the house of my God, than to dwell in the tents of wickedness.

시편 84:11.content: For Yahweh God is a sun and a shield. Yahweh will give grace and glory. He withholds no good thing from those who walk blamelessly.

시편 84:12.content: Yahweh of Armies, blessed is the man who trusts in you.
